title: FTX to distribute $900M to creditors in fifth payment round
summary: The FTX Recovery Trust and company have distributed about $10 billion since the exchange filed for bankruptcy in November 2022, leaving users cut off from their funds.

title: Galaxy lands 15-year Texas Tech stadium naming rights deal
summary: Galaxy Digital will rename Texas Tech’s football stadium under a 15-year agreement, expanding its West Texas presence as the state attracts growing crypto investment.

title: Apple Briefly Tops Nvidia as World’s Most Valuable Company
summary: Apple Inc. briefly overtook Nvidia Corp. as the world’s most valuable company, a title the chipmaker has held since May 2025.

title: Baker Tilly Eyes $3 Billion in Debt to Replace Private Credit
summary: Deutsche Bank AG is preparing to sell about $3 billion in debt markets for accounting services firm Baker Tilly Advisory Group to refinance private credit loans, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Ocean Mining VP Jason Hughes: BIP-110 on Track to Fail as Miner Signaling Stays Below 1%

Ocean Mining’s VP of Development and Engineering Jason Hughes argues BIP-110 lacks measurable consensus, with node signaling at 7-15% and hashrate support under 1% ahead of the critical block 9

title: ECB Warns Stablecoins May Drain Bank Deposits—Here's What That Means
summary: ECB board member Piero Cipollone laid out the three-layer threat banks face from digital payments, and pitched the digital euro as the only structural answer.

title: Cardano Pumps as Network Moves to Further Decentralize Development
summary: Input Output is handing its core infrastructure to outside teams as ADA gets a lift from an imminent protocol upgrade.

title: Bank of America taps new leaders to bridge crypto, AI and traditional finance
summary: Sonali Theisen was named head of BofA's global digital assets platform, while Kevin Milsom was tapped to serve as head of AI transformation

title: CryptoQuant says Strategy still needs disciplined bitcoin buying and selling framework
summary: CryptoQuant said Michael Saylor's Strategy still needs still needs clearer rules for when to buy and sell bitcoin.

title: Trump Media pitched $100,000 monthly fee for fast feed of president’s posts
summary: Family company has quoted the six-figure sum for high-speed access to Truth Social platform

title: Trump envoy’s tour on $450mn superyacht stirs anger in Italy
summary: Rome declines to reveal cost of security for billionaire businessman Tilman Fertitta’s ‘coastal diplomacy’
